title: bellis annua subsp. vandasii
intro: Bellis annua subsp. vandasii is a subspecies of the annual dandelion plant, characterized by its unique leaf structure and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bellis annua subsp. vandasii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
